label: Hong Kong Businesses React to Trump's Potential New Tariffs
summary: Hong Kong businesses and financial officials believe the impact of potential new 15% global tariffs from Trump will be limited.

timeline.event: Hong Kong Stock Market Drops 1.8% Amid Trade Uncertainty
timeline.description: Hong Kong shares tumbled 489 points due to renewed US trade policy uncertainty and broad weakness in the technology sector.

timeline.event: Global Markets Rattled by US 15% Tariff Proposal
timeline.description: Fears of a transatlantic trade war escalated as a proposed 15% global tariff by the US triggered broad market uncertainty.
